zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham於大約1218年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Ranulph FitzRobert35歲，母親Mary Bigod40歲。他和Anastasia de Percy至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1270年3月31日在英國英格蘭越可爾可福哈姆享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾可福哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham于大约1218年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Ranulph FitzRobert35岁，母亲Mary Bigod40岁。他和Anastasia de Percy至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1270年3月31日在英国英格兰越可爾可福哈姆享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾可福哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham was born about 1218, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ranulph FitzRobert, was 35 and his mother, Mary Bigod, was 40. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Anastasia de Percy. He died on 31 March 1270, in Coverham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Coverham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham est né environ 1218, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ranulph FitzRobert, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mary Bigod, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Anastasia de Percy. Il est décédé le 31 mars 1270, à Coverham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Coverham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England: Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham um 1218 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph FitzRobert 35 und seine Mutter Mary Bigod 40. Er hatte mit Anastasia de Percy mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 31. März 1270 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Coverham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Coverham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham è nato il circa 1218 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ranulph FitzRobert, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mary Bigod, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Anastasia de Percy. Morì il 31 marzo 1270, nel Coverham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Coverham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middlehamが約1218年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ranulph FitzRobertは35歳，母Mary Bigodは40歳であった。彼はAnastasia de Percyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1270年3月31日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアコバーハムで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアコバーハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham(이)가 대략 1218년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph FitzRobert(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Bigod(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Anastasia de Percy(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 3월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 커버함에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 커버함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham nasceu aproximadamente 1218, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ranulph FitzRobert, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mary Bigod, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Anastasia de Percy. Ele faleceu em 31 de março de 1270, em Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph FitzRandolph Lord Middleham родился около 1218 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ranulph FitzRobert было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Bigod, 40. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Anastasia de Percy. Он умер 31 марта 1270 г. в местности ковирам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ковирам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Anastasia de Percy.
